coalitions: ASEAN unity bloc led by Indonesia
US-Philippines-Japan security alignment holding in background
China engages on CBMs while isolated on sovereignty claim
note: The FONOP near-miss shocked security dynamics but the cooperative mood and Indonesia's brokering momentum, unaided by mediator pressure, produced an ASEAN-driven CBM/Code-of-Conduct framework that de-escalates without any party conceding its sovereignty red line.
